summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of jewelry demo website fixes. All 6 requested fixes successfully implemented and verified: jewelry-focused products, coral button colors, proper navbar spacing, elegant promo section replacing broken video, visible footer text, and full e-commerce functionality.
passed_tests: Home page displays jewelry products only (bracelets, rings, earrings) instead of shirts/clothes
Navbar has proper 20px spacing between Men/Women/Jewelry links with elegant styling
All buttons use coral color (#f7444e) instead of blue: Add to Cart, Login, Register, Explore Collection, Subscribe
Broken video section replaced with elegant 'Elegance in Every Detail' promo section with coral CTA button
Footer text has good contrast (rgb(176,176,176) on dark background rgb(40,36,36))
Product detail pages load correctly with coral Add to Cart buttons
Add to Cart functionality works and properly redirects to cart page
Explore Collection button in promo section navigates to jewelry category
Login and Register forms display with coral-colored submit buttons
Newsletter subscription section has coral Subscribe button
Products load from FakeStore API jewelry category successfully
Responsive navigation and product sliders working properly
